metadata.description: Claude Code plugins by Girish Attri

plugins.name: session-manager
plugins.description: List, search, and delete Claude Code sessions and all related data across projects. Supported platforms: macOS, Linux, Windows (WSL).

plugins.name: creating-docs
plugins.description: DEPRECATED — superseded by knowledge (>= 0.1.0), which absorbs this plugin's full surface (doc workflows continue as /knowledge:docs-create and /knowledge:docs-review). Final maintenance release; maintenance-only during the deprecation window. Structured process for creating and updating project documentation with reference-based notation, validation scripts, and quality checks. Includes a doc-reviewer subagent for independent accuracy passes.

plugins.name: session-chat
plugins.description: Peer-to-peer messaging and task dispatch between Claude (and Codex) sessions via tmux. Durable delivery routes fallback/dispatch into the recipient runtime's messages dir.

plugins.name: session-context
plugins.description: DEPRECATED — superseded by knowledge (>= 0.1.0), which absorbs this plugin's full surface with behavior-identical ports (anything pinning session-context >= 0.7.0 is satisfied by knowledge >= 0.1.0). Final maintenance release; maintenance-only during the deprecation window. Generate, list, load, share, and remove Claude session context snapshots from a shared store. Surfaces available snapshots on session start.

plugins.name: knowledge
plugins.description: Unified taxonomy tooling for durable project knowledge: docs, memory, and context snapshots in one plugin. Absorbs creating-docs and session-context (both superseded — see their DEPRECATED entries) and adds a native memory module with consolidation, promotion, deterministic search/recall, a backlink graph, and a read-only cross-store doctor.

plugins.name: chronos
plugins.description: Ambient time/day awareness for agents: injects the current date/time as context with every prompt, and refreshes it during long turns via a throttled PreToolUse hook. No explicit invocation needed.

plugins.name: session-scheduler
plugins.description: Thin file-backed task ledger for orchestrator → executor workflows. Layered on session-chat (>=0.13.0) for durable transport.
